citations: "LLM proposes 500 memory cards, one per CSV row"
payload.reason: The input is only a meta-description of a proposed batch of memory cards, not durable personal information to retain. It does not provide stable facts about the user or a clearly stated memory-worthy preference, and the large CSV-row format suggests atomized, low-value content rather than a coherent durable memory.
